calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-02-2022 Off Calendar

MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO ADMISSION/INTERROGATORIES
Off Calendar Oct-11-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT THE RITZ-CARLTON MANAGEMENT COMPANY, L.L.C.'s MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO ADMISSION/INTERROGATORIES:

DEFENDANT RITZ CARLTON MANAGEMENT COMPANY, LLC'S MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF RANULPHO SENA TO FILE RESPONSES TO DEFENDANT'S DISCOVERY REQUESTS AND IMPOSITION OF SANCTIONS IS UNOPPOSED. ACCORDINGLY, THE COURT WILL GRANT THE MOTION AS FOLLOWS:
(1) WITHIN FOURTEEN (14) CALENDAR DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER, PLAINTIFF WILL SERVE DEFENDANT, WITHOUT OBJECTION FULL AND COMPLETE CODE COMPLIANT VERIFIED RESPONSES TO DEFENDANT'S SET ONE FORM INTERROGATORIES; SET ONE REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS AND SET ONE REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION.
(2) THE COURT WILL RETAIN JURISDICTION OF THIS MATTER AND, IF PLAINTIFF FAILS TO COMPLY WITH THE PROVISIONS OF PARAGRAPH (1) ABOVE, THE COURT WILL GRANT DEFENDANTS REQUEST FOR TERMINATING SANCTIONS AND WILL SIGN AN ORDER TO BE PRESENTED TO THE COURT DISMISSING THIS ACTION WITH PREJUDICE.

Order is signed.

Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO ADMISSION/INTERROGATORIES
